display.name: Soap Bubbles
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Iridescent soap bubbles rising and shimmering through soft afternoon light, gentle and contemplative.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense custom wave resembling a microscopic cellular colony morphs and stretches across a dark void. A dramatic zoom transition, driven by the audio's bass energy, plunges the camera into the structure, scattering iridescent, bubble-like particles across the screen. Persistent trails are maintained via sampler_main feedback with low decay, while treble-driven specular highlights create a shimmering bloom_glow on the cell walls.
